title: astragalus arctus
intro: Astragalus arctus, also known as the milk vetch, is a type of legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects, which help to boost the body's natural defenses and promote overall well-being. The health benefits of Astragalus arctus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function, making it a popular herb for preventing illnesses and promoting longevity. Astragalus arctus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as dried root extracts, capsules, and teas, which are often used to support immune function and overall health.
